data.title: Create test-tag-policy-docs.sh with structural boundary tests
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Write tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh FIRST. All 6 tests will FAIL (RED) before Task 2 runs because the structural elements they assert on do not yet exist.

Tests apply Rule 5 (behavioral testing standard) — structural boundary tests for non-executable documentation files:

1. test_arch_doc_has_tag_policy_section
   Given: plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md exists
   When: grep for "Tag Policy" section heading
   Then: exit 0 — structural section heading is present

2. test_arch_doc_tag_policy_covers_guarded_tags
   Given: plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md
   When: grep for "brainstorm:complete" in Tag Policy section content
   Then: exit 0 — guarded tags are enumerated in the policy

3. test_arch_doc_tag_policy_covers_writer_taxonomy
   Given: plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md
   When: grep for "additive" (structural marker for writer taxonomy)
   Then: exit 0 — writer taxonomy is described

4. test_scrutiny_tag_doc_has_policy_crossref
   Given: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/scrutiny-pending-tag.md
   When: grep for "ticket-system-v3-architecture" (cross-reference link target)
   Then: exit 0 — referential integrity: link to Tag Policy section is present

5. test_interaction_deferred_doc_has_policy_crossref
   Given: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/interaction-deferred-tag.md
   When: grep for "ticket-system-v3-architecture"
   Then: exit 0 — referential integrity: link to Tag Policy section is present

6. test_claude_md_has_ticket_tag_commands
   Given: CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table
   When: grep for "ticket tag" AND grep for "ticket untag"
   Then: both exit 0 — both commands appear in the Quick Reference

## .test-index additions (RED markers embedded in source-mapping lines):
plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md:tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh [test_arch_doc_has_tag_policy_section]
plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md:tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh [test_arch_doc_tag_policy_covers_guarded_tags]
plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md:tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh [test_arch_doc_tag_policy_covers_writer_taxonomy]
plugins/dso/docs/contracts/scrutiny-pending-tag.md:tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh [test_scrutiny_tag_doc_has_policy_crossref]
plugins/dso/docs/contracts/interaction-deferred-tag.md:tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh [test_interaction_deferred_doc_has_policy_crossref]
CLAUDE.md:tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh [test_claude_md_has_ticket_tag_commands]

Note: test filename is not fuzzy-matchable to any source file — .test-index entries above are required.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh
- [ ] Test file contains exactly 6 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh | awk '{exit ($1 != 6)}'
- [ ] All 6 tests currently FAIL (RED) — Tag Policy section and cross-references do not yet exist
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index contains all 6 RED markers
  Verify: grep -q '\[test_arch_doc_has_tag_policy_section\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && grep -q '\[test_arch_doc_tag_policy_covers_guarded_tags\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && grep -q '\[test_arch_doc_tag_policy_covers_writer_taxonomy\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && grep -q '\[test_scrutiny_tag_doc_has_policy_crossref\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && grep -q '\[test_interaction_deferred_doc_has_policy_crossref\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && grep -q '\[test_claude_md_has_ticket_tag_commands\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index source-mapping lines added for all 4 source files
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-system-v3-architecture.md:tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && grep -q 'CLAUDE.md:tests/scripts/test-tag-policy-docs.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
